_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Electrical contact burns: High voltage - without part of limb / limb loss; Includes % TBSA skin grafted, flap cover, follow-up dressings etc. as deemed necessary; Surgical procedures are required for deep burns that are not amenable to heal with dressings alone.

preauth.label: Clinical notes mentioning the circumstances that led to low voltage electrical contact burns
Document showing % of burn through rule of 9

claim.label: Blood test (CBC, Sr. creatinine, Platelet etc.)

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes clearly mentioning the areas affected by burn with % of TBSA burn as per rule of 9?
Was the Copy of MLC with number submitted?
Clinical photograph of the affected part
Did the Clinical notes mentioning the circumstances that led to low voltage electrical contact burns/ High voltage contact burn?
Has the patient presented with either all or some burns of deep partial thickness or full thickness?

cpd_claim.q: Is there documentary evidence of indication of surgery submitted?
Are detailed operative notes available with indications for surgery and outcomes of the procedure?
Is discharge summary available with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?
Is the post treatment photograph available?
Were all the lab test reports submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes do not mention the specific voltage (low or high) of the electrical contact burn, or the circumstances leading to it.
Patient's burns are not documented as deep partial thickness or full thickness, or documentation is missing.
Clinical notes do not clearly state the areas affected by burn with % TBSA as per Rule of 9.
MLC copy with number is missing or the number is not provided.
Documentary evidence for indication of surgery is not submitted at the claim stage.
Detailed operative notes are missing or do not contain sufficient information regarding indications for surgery and outcomes.
Discharge summary is missing or does not include follow-up advice.
All required lab test reports (e.g., CBC, Sr. creatinine, Platelet etc.) are not submitted.

additional_information.referral_criteria: referral of cases to the appropriate level of care (as required) for treatment of patients under PMJAY and selection of corresponding Health Benefit Package.
